---
title: "Teaching"
format: html
page-layout: full
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

This is where I share resources related to courses, workshops, talks and various other types of presentations. 

### [Apple Game Simulation for Stockholm Bayes Club](teaching/apple_game_simulation.qmd)

Simulates the outcome of a game found in a Basme comic book for Stockholm Bayes Club

### [Resources for workshop on AI supported course development for Stockholm University's "Lärarkonferens2026":](teaching/2026_teaching_conference.qmd)

Resources for a workshop about using AI as support in course development, focusing on the benefits but also the challenges. 

### [Resources for workshop about Test-enhanced learning and using AI to support the development of questions:](teaching/retrieval_practice_and_ai_workshop.qmd)

Resources for a test-enhanced learning (retrieval practice), and how AI might support development of questions and feedback. 

------------------------------------------------------------------------
